name: Frodo Baggins
description: Ring-bearer and hero of the War of the Ring.

name: Gandalf
description: Maia spirit and guide of the Fellowship.

name: Aragorn
description: Heir of Isildur and rightful King of Gondor.

name: Legolas
description: Prince of the Woodland Realm and skilled archer.

name: Gimli
description: Son of Glóin and stout-hearted member of the Fellowship.

name: Boromir
description: Son of the Steward of Gondor and valiant warrior.

name: Meriadoc Brandybuck
description: Merry - one of Frodo's closest friends.

name: Peregrin Took
description: Pippin - young and curious hobbit of the Fellowship.

name: Sauron
description: The Dark Lord and maker of the One Ring.

name: Galadriel
description: Lady of the Golden Wood and bearer of Nenya.

name: Saruman
description: Head of the Istari order corrupted by the Ring's power.
